prompt: A candid smartphone mirror selfie in a moody upscale restroom with deep {argument name="wall color" default="crimson red"} textured walls and a large round mirror with a thin black frame dominating the composition. A {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} with long {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} wavy hair stands slightly off-center, leaning her torso forward and to the side in a relaxed confident pose, one hand holding the phone in front of her face and the other braced on a dark stone or marble countertop. She wears a fitted black off-shoulder long-sleeve top with a sweetheart neckline and high-waisted charcoal or black jeans, with a black shoulder bag tucked under one arm. The phone flash is extremely bright, fully obscuring the face and creating a sharp starburst plus 1 strong horizontal blue-white lens flare streak across the image, with subtle bloom and realistic smartphone exposure clipping. Behind her is a dark wooden paneled door centered in the reflection. The room includes 2 tall cylindrical wall sconces with warm glowing bulbs, one on each side near the mirror edges, 1 small gold-toned light switch plate on the left wall, 1 curved brushed-metal faucet visible at the bottom center, and 2 small candle holders or votive lights at the lower right edge. Style is authentic phone-camera photography, slightly grainy, warm low-light ambience, realistic reflections, minor sensor noise, natural shadows, intimate nightlife restroom aesthetic, vertical portrait framing.
translatedPrompt: 一张在氛围感十足的高档洗手间内拍摄的写实风格手机镜面自拍，背景为深色 {argument name="wall color" default="深红色"} 质感墙面，构图中心是一面带有细黑框的大型圆形镜子。一位留着长 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 波浪卷发的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"} 略微偏离中心站立，上半身向前并向侧面倾斜，姿态放松自信；一只手拿着手机遮住面部，另一只手支撑在深色石材或大理石台面上。她身穿黑色修身露肩长袖上衣，领口呈心形，搭配高腰炭灰色或黑色牛仔裤，腋下夹着一个黑色单肩包。手机闪光灯极其明亮，完全遮住了面部，并在画面中制造出强烈的星芒效果，以及 1 条明显的蓝白色横向镜头光晕，伴有细微的光晕效果和写实的手机摄影过曝感。她身后是镜面反射中居中的深色木质镶板门。房间内包括 2 个高大的圆柱形壁灯，灯泡散发着温暖的光芒，分别位于镜子边缘两侧；左侧墙上有 1 个小型金色灯光开关面板；底部中心可见 1 个弧形拉丝金属水龙头；右下角边缘有 2 个小型烛台或祈祷灯。风格为真实的手机摄影，带有轻微颗粒感、温暖的低光环境、写实的反射效果、轻微的传感器噪点、自然的阴影，呈现出私密的夜生活洗手间美学，采用竖向人像构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 红色洗手间闪光灯镜面自拍：此提示词可生成一张在时尚红色洗手间内拍摄的写实风格手机闪光灯镜面自拍，非常适合生活方式、时尚或社交媒体风格的摄影需求。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
